ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exchange */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the exchange */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for the exchange */,
  "apikey" TEXT /* API key for the exchange */,
  "secret_key" TEXT /* Secret key for the exchange */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the exchange is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blockchains" (
  "blockchain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blockchain */,
  "blockchain_name" TEXT /* Name of the blockchain */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the blockchain */,
  "explorer_url" TEXT /* URL of the blockchain explorer */,
  "node_url" TEXT /* URL of the blockchain node */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Network ID of the blockchain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("blockchain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "contract_name" TEXT /* Name of the contract */,
  "contract_address" TEXT /* Address of the contract on the blockchain */,
  "blockchain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the blockchain where the contract is deployed */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the token */,
  "decimals" INTEGER /* Number of decimal places for the token */,
  "abi" TEXT /* Application Binary Interface (ABI) of the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_blockchain_id FOREIGN KEY ("blockchain_id") REFERENCES blockchains ("blockchain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address on the blockchain */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label or description of the address */,
  "is_contract" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the address is a contract */,
  "balance" TEXT /* Current balance of the address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "transaction_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the transaction */,
  "blockchain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the blockchain where the transaction occurred */,
  "block_height" INTEGER /* Block height of the transaction */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the transaction */,
  "from_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the address sending the transaction */,
  "to_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the address receiving the transaction */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract involved in the transaction */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "fee" TEXT /* Transaction fee */,
  "gas_used" INTEGER /* Gas used for the transaction */,
  "gas_price" TEXT /* Gas price of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_blockchain_id FOREIGN KEY ("blockchain_id") REFERENCES blockchains ("blockchain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_from_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_to_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "balances" (
  "balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each balance entry */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the address */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract */,
  "block_height" INTEGER /* Block height at which the balance was recorded */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the balance */,
  "balance_normalized" TEXT /* Normalized balance of the token */,
  "balance_denormalized" TEXT /* Denormalized balance of the token */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balances_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balances_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, auditor, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_mapping_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_mapping_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blockchain_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "blockchain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the blockchain */,
  "block_height" INTEGER /* Block height at which the update occurred */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the update (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the update failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blockchain_updates_blockchain_id FOREIGN KEY ("blockchain_id") REFERENCES blockchains ("blockchain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., Transfer, Approval) */,
  "block_height" INTEGER /* Block height at which the event occurred */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "event_data" TEXT /* Data associated with the event */,
  "transaction_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the transaction that emitted the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_events_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the address */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label or description of the address */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_pairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pair */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the pair is traded */,
  "base_asset" TEXT /* Base asset of the pair */,
  "quote_asset" TEXT /* Quote asset of the pair */,
  "min_order_size" TEXT /* Minimum order size for the pair */,
  "max_order_size" TEXT /* Maximum order size for the pair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_pairs_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pair being traded */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the trade occurred */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trade */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the trade */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_trades_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES exchange_pairs ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_trades_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)
